options.name: --project
options.description:
List of paths to your .fsproj file. Cannot be
combined with `--fsc-args`.

options.name: --script
options.description:
List of paths to your .fsx file. Supports globs.
Cannot be combined with `--fsc-args`.

options.name: --analyzers-path
options.description:
List of path to a folder where your analyzers are
located. This will search recursively.

options.name: --property
options.description: A key=value pair of an MSBuild property.

options.name: --configuration
options.description: The configuration to use, e.g. Debug or Release.

options.name: --runtime
options.description: The runtime identifier (RID).

options.name: --arch
options.description: The target architecture.

options.name: --os
options.description: The target operating system.

options.name: --treat-as-info
options.description:
List of analyzer codes that should be treated as
severity Info by the tool. Regardless of the original
severity.

options.name: --treat-as-hint
options.description:
List of analyzer codes that should be treated as
severity Hint by the tool. Regardless of the original
severity.

options.name: --treat-as-warning
options.description:
List of analyzer codes that should be treated as
severity Warning by the tool. Regardless of the
original severity.

options.name: --treat-as-error
options.description:
List of analyzer codes that should be treated as
severity Error by the tool. Regardless of the
original severity.

options.name: --exclude-files
options.description: Source files that shouldn't be processed.

options.name: --include-files
options.description:
Source files that should be processed exclusively
while all others are ignored. Takes precedence over

options.name: --exclude-analyzers
options.description: The names of analyzers that should not be executed.

options.name: --include-analyzers
options.description:
The names of analyzers that should exclusively be
executed while all others are ignored. Takes
precedence over --exclude-analyzers.

options.name: --report
options.description: Write the result messages to a (sarif) report file.

options.name: --fsc-args
options.description:
Pass in the raw fsc compiler arguments. Cannot be
combined with the `--project` flag.

options.name: --fsc-args-file
options.description:
Path to a response (RSP) file containing fsc compiler
arguments. Cannot be combined with `--project` or
`--fsc-args` flags.

options.name: --code-root
options.description:
Root of the current code repository, used in the
sarif report to construct the relative file path. The
current working directory is used by default.

options.name: --verbosity
options.description:
The verbosity level. The available verbosity levels
are: n[ormal], d[etailed], diag[nostic].

options.name: --output-format
options.description:
Format in which to write analyzer results to stdout.
The available options are: default, github.

options.name: --binlog-path
options.description:
Path to a directory where MSBuild binary logs
(binlog) will be written. You can use
https://msbuildlog.com/ to view them.

options.name: --help
options.description: display this list of options.
